query: Create a new git worktree with wt so I can parallelize this work into independent chunks.
Use Worktrunk to spin up a worktree for the auth-token-refresh chunk, but check disk space first.
List my managed worktrees and clean up the finished one.
Split this big task into parallel chunks, each in its own wt worktree.
Connect to my GitHub Codespace and run the tests there.
Run git checkout -b feature-x in this repo.
Explain how git worktrees work conceptually.
